description_long: This shotgun features a robust, tactical design with a long cylindrical barrel and an extended magazine that appears to hold a high capacity of shells, visible through the open top. The receiver and barrel are finished in matte black, while the magazine is metallic with visible brass-colored shells. The grip is ergonomically shaped and appears to be made of a dark brown or black polymer. The stock is a minimalist, skeletal design, likely for weight reduction and maneuverability. The overall construction suggests a modern, semi-automatic shotgun intended for rapid fire and urban tactical use.
description: A modern, tactical shotgun with a long black barrel, extended visible magazine, and a minimalist skeletal stock. The grip is ergonomic and the magazine displays brass-colored shells.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the barrel, the extended magazine with visible shells, and the ergonomic grip.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the open magazine with rows of brass-colored shells and the width of the receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the barrel, magazine, and skeletal stock, with the grip and trigger area visible.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the barrel's muzzle and the open magazine, with the grip and stock partially visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long cylindrical barrel with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
